name: RealPage Property Management API
what_it_does: RealPage REST API for multifamily property management platform. Enables AI agents to manage leasing workflows, prospect and resident data, maintenance requests, rent collection, financial reporting, and utility management across apartment communities. RealPage serves large multifamily apartment operators, student housing, and affordable housing providers.
use_cases: Managing lease applications and resident data from leasing automation agents
Processing maintenance requests from property operations agents
Querying financial and occupancy data from property analytics agents
Integrating RealPage resident data with CRM and marketing platforms from integration agents
not_for: Small landlords without enterprise property management needs
Commercial real estate without residential leasing workflows
best_when: A large multifamily apartment operator or REIT using RealPage wants AI agents to automate leasing, resident communication, maintenance dispatch, and financial reporting.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Resident personal data including financial history and rental applications is highly sensitive. FCRA (Fair Credit Reporting Act) requirements apply to rental screening data.

auth.notes: RealPage uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Partner/developer registration required. Scopes per data domain. Enterprise property management credentials via RealPage partner program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise property management licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-unit pricing; enterprise contracts for large portfolios
pricing.notes: Thoma Bravo-owned (acquired 2021). Controversial rental pricing algorithmic concerns (2023 DOJ investigation). Developer partner program for integrations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per partner application; enterprise SLAs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Resident personal data including rental history and financial screening (FCRA applies)
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API via partner program
FCRA compliance required for rental screening data access and use
Controversial algorithmic pricing practices — DOJ investigation context
Partner program approval required before API access
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Resident personal data and rental financial history. SOC2, FCRA. US-only. Partner approval required. Rental screening data has strict FCRA compliance requirements.

security_score_components.security_notes: Resident personal and financial data. SOC2, FCRA. US-only. FCRA compliance critical for screening data.
